events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessed the smoke detector spacing/placement condition at rough-complete stage against NFPA 72 requirements and wrote the compliance determination to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: fail** (high risk) — the observed spacing/placement doesn't demonstrate compliance with NFPA 72's detector spacing rules (nominal spacing, wall/corner offsets, obstruction/diffuser adjustments), and no engineered layout was on hand to justify the installed positions. Recommended corrective path: halt close-in, re-verify spacing via engineering calc, relocate/add detectors as needed, resubmit for AHJ review, and re-inspect before sign-off.
